ecarx.carext.connect.net.wifi

Interface StaConnectionListener


  • public interface StaConnectionListener
    Wi-Fi sta connection info observer.
    Since:
    4

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  StaConnectionListener.ErrorCode
      Error code.
      static interface  StaConnectionListener.State
      Connection state.

      Ssid not found

      • onStateChanged

        void onStateChanged(int state,
                    @NonNull
                    android.net.wifi.WifiInfo wifiInfo)
        Called when the state changes.
        Parameters:
        state - current state.
        wifiInfo - The Wi-Fi info corresponding to state.
        Since:
        4
